articles.description:
Crumbl brings back its Dubai Chocolate Brownie as part of this week's limited-time dessert lineup available from October 20 through October 25, 2025, at locations nationwide.

Here's what this week's Crumbl dessert menu looks like:
- Dubai Chocolate Brownie - A chilled brownie with a crunchy kataifi and pistachio cream filling, topped with a layer of milk chocolate and a drizzle of pistachio cream.
- Tres Leches Cake - A vanilla cake soaked in a classic tres leches sauce, topped with whipped cream and cinnamon.
- Cookies & Cream Cookie - A warm marbled dark chocolate and vanilla cookie packed with white drops and topped with a white drizzle and cookies & cream pieces.
- Cereal Milk Cookie - A warm cereal-inspired sugar cookie brushed with a milky glaze and topped with fruity cereal.
- Original M&M's Cookie - A warm cookie packed with Milk Chocolate M&M's candies.
- Banana Bread Cookie - A warm banana cookie infused with brown sugar, cinnamon, and vanilla, topped with a cream cheese glaze and a brown sugar streusel.
- Milk Chocolate Chip Cookie - A warm cookie packed with milk chocolate chips.
- Weekly "Secret Menu" - A mystery cookie or dessert that varies with location. You can check the Crumbl website or mobile app to see what's available near you.
Photo via Crumbl.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Crumbl Brings Back Dubai Chocolate Brownie Through October 25, 2025

articles.description:
The Big Box combo meal is back at Popeyes for a limited time this fall.

Popeyes' Big Box includes two pieces of fried chicken or three chicken tenders plus two regular sides and a biscuit.
Prices vary, but it costs $6.99 here in Los Angeles (it's $6 in some areas).
Popeyes is also offering a $1 wings deal throughout October. You can get either 12 wings for $12 or 18 wings for $18.
Photo via Popeyes.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Big Box Deal Returns to Popeyes

articles.description:
Taco Bell is considering a potential expansion of its Cantina Chicken Menu with its new Cantina Fajita test menu at participating locations in the Dallas, TX area.

The key feature of the menu is seasoned bell peppers and onions paired with either carne asada (steak) or slow-roasted chicken. As with the Cantina Menu, all items come with a packet of Avocado Verde Salsa. The Cantina Fajita menu includes:
- Cantina Fajita Bowl - A bed of seasoned rice topped with simmered black beans, pico de gallo, guacamole, reduced-fat sour cream, seasoned bell peppers and onions, a three-cheese blend, Creamy Jalapeno sauce, and a double portion of carne asada or slow-roasted chicken. Two small warm flour tortillas are included on the side. It's priced at $7.99 with either protein option.
- Cantina Fajita Grilled Cheese Burrito - Seasoned rice, carne asada or slow-roasted chicken, seasoned bell peppers and onions, Creamy Jalapeno sauce, and a three-cheese blend, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla and topped with a layer of grilled cheese. The suggested price for the burrito is $5.99.
- Cantina Fajita Grilled Soft Taco - A soft flour tortilla folded and grilled with carne asada or slow-roasted chicken, seasoned bell peppers and onions, Creamy Jalapeno sauce, and a three-cheese blend. It's priced at $3.49.
- Cantina Fajita Quesadilla - A large flour tortilla folded with carne asada or slow-roasted chicken, seasoned bell peppers and onions, Creamy Jalapeno sauce, and a three-cheese blend, and then grilled. It costs $6.49.
- Cantina Fajita Discovery Luxe Box - For $9, the box includes a Cantina Fajita Grilled Soft Taco (carne asada or slow-roasted chicken), Doritos Locos Taco, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Cinnamon Twists, and a medium fountain drink.
Photo via Taco Bell.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Taco Bell Tests New Cantina Fajita Menu

articles.description:
Popeyes' Cajun-Style Turkey makes its annual return for the 2025 Thanksgiving season.

Available for a limited time at participating locations as well as online for nationwide (continental US only) shipping to your door, the pre-seasoned, fully-cooked turkey needs to be thawed and reheated before eating.
Each Cajun-Style Turkey weighs about 11 to 13 pounds and is meant to serve eight to 12 people. You can pre-order it in person or through the Popeyes website or mobile app.
Pricing for the Cajun turkey starts at $54.99 when purchased from a Popeyes restaurant and $99.99 to get one shipped to your home.
If you're curious as to how Popeyes' Cajun-Style Turkey turns out, I tried and reviewed one a while back.
Photo via Popeyes.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Popeyes' Cajun-Style Turkey Returns for 2025 Thanksgiving Season

articles.description:
Taco Bell brings back the flavor of Flamin' Hot with the launch of its new Flamin' Hot Grilled Cheese Burrito, which features both Flamin' Hot Fritos corn chips and new Flamin' Hot Rice.

In addition to Flamin' Hot Fritos and Flamin' Hot Rice, the Flamin' Hot Grilled Cheese Burrito also contains seasoned beef, a three-cheese blend, Creamy Chipotle sauce, warm nacho cheese sauce, and reduced-fat sour cream inside a warm flour tortilla topped with grilled cheese. The limited-time item has its roots in the Beefy Crunch Burrito but is described as "cheesier" and "spicier."
Taco Bell's new Flamin' Hot Rice is made with Fritos Flamin' Hot Chips, red peppers, cheddar cheese powder, garlic, paprika, and lime. In addition to being found in the new burrito, you can also purchase it as a side for $1.
The Flamin' Hot Grilled Cheese Burrito is available at participating locations nationwide. You can buy one a la carte for a suggested price of $5.49, while supplies last. It's also showcased in a $9 Discovery Luxe Cravings Box that includes the burrito, a Chicken Chalupa Supreme, a Crunchy Taco, Chips & Nacho Cheese Sauce, and a medium fountain drink for $9.
Photo via Taco Bell.
Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Flamin' Hot Grilled Cheese Burrito
Calories - 730
Fat - 41g (Saturated Fat - 17g)
Sodium - 1270mg
Carbs - 65g (Sugar - 4g)
Protein - 26g
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Taco Bell Debuts New Flamin' Hot Grilled Cheese Burrito

articles.description:
Cafe-bakery chain Paris Baguette welcomes a slate of Halloween-themed cakes and donuts for the spooky holiday. This year's Halloween lineup includes:

- Dirt & Worms Chocolate Chiffon Cake - Riffing on dirt cups, it features chocolate chiffon cake layered with cookies & cream soft cream with cookie "dirt" and gummy worms.
- Dirt & Worms King Cream Donut - A soft donut filled with cookies & cream custard, topped with cookies & cream white chocolate, cookie "dirt," and a gummy worm.
- Vanilla Scream Ghost Cake - Vanilla sponge cake layered with custard cream, decorated with soft cream ghosts and chocolate spider webs.
- Spider Mochi Donut - A mochi donut covered in cookies & cream white chocolate, topped with a chocolate sandwich cookie and drizzled with chocolate "spider legs."
As part of the Halloween festivities, Paris Baguette will also be offering a free pastry with any beverage purchase to its rewards members on Halloween (October 31, 2025).
Photo via Paris Baguette.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Paris Baguette Welcomes 2025 Halloween Menu

articles.description:
Mexican food brand Ortega partners with Cheez-It to launch new Cheez-It Flavored Taco Shells.

The crunchy hard taco shell is infused with the cheesy flavor of Cheez-It crackers. In addition to being filled to make tacos, the shell is also meant to be enjoyed as a snack right out of the box.
You can find new Ortega Cheez-It Flavored Taco Shells at Target (where a 4.6-oz box containing 10 taco shells costs $3.19 near me; the price varies with location) and select retailers nationwide. Availability at additional grocery stores is slated for the coming months.
Photo via Ortega.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: New Cheez-It Flavored Taco Shells Arrive

articles.description:
Krispy Kreme's 2025 Halloween donuts are here for a limited time as the "Trick or Treat! Collection." Featuring four new, festive donuts (in a Halloween-themed box if you buy a dozen), here's what you can expect:

- The Candy Bag Donut - An Original Glazed donut topped with chocolate-flavored buttercreme, a buttery caramel-flavored swirl, and a sprinkle of trick-or-treat candy blend.
- Cookies and Skreme House Donut - A shell donut filled with Cookies & Kreme filling, dipped in chocolate icing, and topped with crunchy silver chocolate cookies, a wavy line of purple buttercream-flavored icing, and a spooky Haunted House piece.
- Jack-O-Lantern Donut - A shell donut topped with orange buttercream-flavored icing, Jack-O-Lantern face pieces, and a green icing stem.
- Spooky Sprinkle Donut - An Original Glazed donut topped with green icing and Halloween sprinkles.
As part of this year's Halloween festivities, Krispy Kreme will be giving out a free Original Glazed or Classic Ring donut for costumed visitors at participating shops on Saturday, October 25, 2025, and again on Friday, October 31, 2025 (no purchase necessary).
Krispy Kreme's Trick or Treat! Collection is available now at participating locations nationwide. They can also be found in a 6-pack delivered daily to select retailers.
Photo via Krispy Kreme.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Krispy Kreme's 2025 Halloween Donuts Arrive

articles.description:
Taco Bell unveils its new Frank's RedHot Diablo menu, which features a mix of "original Buffalo flavor, Taco Bell’s signature Diablo sauce, and spicy ranch." With the launch of the menu on October 16, 2025, Crispy Chicken Strips and Nacho Fries are back for a limited time.

Here's what you can expect to find on the new, limited-time menu:
- Frank's RedHot Diablo Crispy Chicken Burrito - Crispy chicken strips, shredded lettuce, purple cabbage, pico de gallo, cheddar cheese, and a choice of Frank's RedHot Diablo or Avocado Ranch, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla and then grilled. The suggested price for the burrito is $5.49.
- Frank's RedHot Diablo Crispy Chicken Soft Taco - A Crispy Chicken strip, purple cabbage, lettuce, pico de gallo, cheddar cheese, and a choice of Frank's RedHot Diablo or Avocado Ranch, served folded in a soft flour tortilla. It carries a suggested price of $2.99.
- Frank's RedHot Diablo Chicken Nacho Fries - Seasoned Nacho Fries topped with slow-roasted chicken, nacho cheese sauce, a three-cheese blend, pico de gallo, and a drizzle of Frank's RedHot Diablo. The suggested price for this one is $4.99.
- Crispy Chicken Strips with Spicy Ranch - Four crispy-fried strips of white meat chicken coated in a crunchy tortilla chip breading and served with a choice of Spicy Ranch or Frank’s RedHot® Diablo sauce. The suggested price tag for an order comes out to $6.99.
Photo via Taco Bell.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Taco Bell Reveals New Frank's RedHot Diablo Sauce Menu

articles.description:
Apple Crisp (AKA apple brown sugar syrup) is back for a "very limited time" at Starbucks in the US, while supplies last.

The fall flavor is highlighted in the Iced Apple Crisp Oatmilk Shaken Espresso. The drink features Starbucks Blonde Espresso shaken with apple brown sugar syrup, poured over ice, and topped with oat milk. 
While it's available, you can also add apple brown sugar syrup to any beverage. It's also used to make Apple Crispy Cold Foam and new Apple Crispy Protein Cold Foam. Both can be added to any iced drink as a customization for an extra charge.
Photo via Starbucks.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Apple Crisp Returns to Starbucks

articles.description:
Sonic adds to its iced coffee options with the launch of new Bourbon Caramel Iced Coffee. The new flavor is available starting October 20, 2025, as a Sonic app-exclusive flavor ahead of a national launch on November 3, 2025.

The flavor features cold brew iced coffee with bourbon caramel flavor (non-alcoholic), crowned with whipped topping, a caramel drizzle, and a mini cowboy hat garnish.
Bourbon Caramel Iced Coffee was inspired by the winning creation from the TV series "On Brand with Jimmy Fallon." The show challenges creative contestants to design campaigns for various brands.
The average price for the new coffee flavor is $3.69 for a medium.
Photo via Sonic Drive-in.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Sonic Launches New Bourbon Caramel Iced Coffee
